_doc: M21 entry-refinement coverage matrix - one row per strategy leg (same roster as the M20 exit matrix). THE milestone's done-condition: every live leg carries a verdict per entry-filter column (shipped / passed_unshipped / honest_negative / pending / blocked:<reason> / n/a). Update in the SAME PR as any verdict-producing work. Statuses only from verified evidence (memo/sprint-log/PR refs) - never inferred. Design: docs/research/M21-entry-refinement-DESIGN.md.

legend.honest_negative: tested, failed the gate - the unfiltered entry stands

column_notes.entry_baseline: E-1 evidence pass (m21_entry_baseline.py) - status 'shipped' here means the leg's diagnostics were computed and rank-listed, not that anything changed live
column_notes.confirmation_bars: require the signal to hold N closed bars before entering (E-2)
column_notes.depth_threshold: tighter breakout-depth / setup-strength cells: donchian min_confidence, pullback pullback_frac band + adx_min (E-2)
column_notes.vol_at_entry: skip entries at extreme entry-bar ATR percentile (E-2)
column_notes.time_of_day: skip the leg's data-derived net-negative hours; same yearly walk-forward gate - no cherry-picked windows (E-2)
column_notes.p_win_head: ML P(win)-at-entry head (first_touch +1R before -1R label); primary consumer is the M18 allocator (E-3)

entry_baseline.ref: E-1 fleet baseline 2026-07-13 (m21_entry_baseline.py, trainer relay #6305 launch + #6306 readout; runtime_logs/m21_entry_baseline/2026-07-13). BTC 1h: 20.6% early-fail costing -79.3R (n=428, net +27.4R); chop-regime entries -15.1R/153t; hour:15 -15.8R. AXIS: confirmation_bars + depth_threshold.

E-1 fleet baseline 2026-07-13 (m21_entry_baseline.py, trainer relay #6305 launch + #6306 readout; runtime_logs/m21_entry_baseline/2026-07-13). ETH 1h: 22.4% early-fail costing -144.5R (n=957, net -25.7R - the fleet's worst entry deficit on a live leg); chop entries -41.2R/235t. AXIS: confirmation_bars + depth_threshold (highest priority).

E-1 fleet baseline 2026-07-13 (m21_entry_baseline.py, trainer relay #6305 launch + #6306 readout; runtime_logs/m21_entry_baseline/2026-07-13). SOL 1h: 19.8% early-fail costing -58.7R (n=389, net +45.7R). AXIS: confirmation_bars + depth_threshold.

E-1 fleet baseline 2026-07-13 (m21_entry_baseline.py, trainer relay #6305 launch + #6306 readout; runtime_logs/m21_entry_baseline/2026-07-13). BTC 2h: 12.8% early-fail -25.4R (n=375, net +56.4R); chop entries -5.8R/74t; hour:16 -8.5R. AXIS: confirmation_bars (mild) / time_of_day (walk-forward-gated).

E-1 fleet baseline 2026-07-13 (m21_entry_baseline.py, trainer relay #6305 launch + #6306 readout; runtime_logs/m21_entry_baseline/2026-07-13). ETH 2h: 16.7% early-fail -30.6R (n=252, net +67.7R); hour:10 -9.1R. AXIS: confirmation_bars / time_of_day.

E-1 fleet baseline 2026-07-13 (m21_entry_baseline.py, trainer relay #6305 launch + #6306 readout; runtime_logs/m21_entry_baseline/2026-07-13). alt 2h pullbacks: 14.8-19.0% early-fail, -2.9 to -28.9R each; scattered hour pockets. AXIS: confirmation_bars; time_of_day only where a pocket survives walk-forward.

E-1 fleet baseline 2026-07-13 (m21_entry_baseline.py, trainer relay #6305 launch + #6306 readout; runtime_logs/m21_entry_baseline/2026-07-13). 4h donchians: 12.3-22.7% early-fail, -10.1 to -36.7R each; xrp worst (-36.7R, 22.7%); hour:0 negative on ada/avax/eth/xrp (UTC-midnight bar). AXIS: confirmation_bars + depth_threshold; check hour:0 cell.
no harness emit in the 2026-07-13 flip-replay set (squeeze/fvg/disabled legs) - needs its own --emit-trades run
no harness emit in the 2026-07-13 flip-replay set (squeeze/fvg/disabled legs) - needs its own --emit-trades run

E-1 fleet baseline 2026-07-13 (m21_entry_baseline.py, trainer relay #6305 launch + #6306 readout; runtime_logs/m21_entry_baseline/2026-07-13). 1d futures: clean entries (2.1-19.7% early-fail but tiny costs -0.9 to -5.5R). Low priority for E-2.

E-1 fleet baseline 2026-07-13 (m21_entry_baseline.py, trainer relay #6305 launch + #6306 readout; runtime_logs/m21_entry_baseline/2026-07-13). xauusd/mgc 1h (proxy-identical rows): early-fail negligible (1.5%) BUT trending-regime entries -20.9R/158t and transitional -12.8R/93t - a regime/vol-at-entry shaped deficit, not a confirmation one. AXIS: vol_at_entry / depth_threshold.

E-1 fleet baseline 2026-07-13 (m21_entry_baseline.py, trainer relay #6305 launch + #6306 readout; runtime_logs/m21_entry_baseline/2026-07-13). 1d equities: trend legs clean (0-13.8% early-fail, <=-5.7R); slv_pullback_1d is the outlier (19.9%, -29.3R on net +52.6R). AXIS: slv_pullback_1d confirmation_bars; rest low priority.

E-1 fleet baseline 2026-07-13 (m21_entry_baseline.py, trainer relay #6305 launch + #6306 readout; runtime_logs/m21_entry_baseline/2026-07-13). 1h equities: low early-fail rates (2.1-7.7%) but real costs on the busy legs (tlt -25.6R, qqq -17.8R, gld -14.6R, spy -13.2R); late-session hours (19/20 UTC) negative on qqq/gld/tlt. AXIS: time_of_day (walk-forward-gated) + confirmation_bars.

rows.strategy: shadow fleet (turtle_soup, fade_breakout_4h, vwap, ict_scalp_5m, trend_donchian_1h, mgc_trend_1h, *_prop)

entry_baseline.ref: E-1 fleet baseline 2026-07-13 (m21_entry_baseline.py, trainer relay #6305 launch + #6306 readout; runtime_logs/m21_entry_baseline/2026-07-13). shadow legs incl. trend_donchian_1h: 22.4% early-fail -187.4R (n=1263, net -74.1R) - confirms the donchian-1h family deficit at scale; prop twins mirror their base legs.

E-1 fleet baseline 2026-07-13 (#6306): proxy-identical XAUUSD rows - early-fail negligible (1.5%) but trending-regime entries -20.9R/158t; AXIS: vol_at_entry / depth_threshold (same as the live xauusd row).
